title: Fetch URL
description: Fetch a live URL, respect robots and sitemap discovery, canonicalise it, deduplicate the content, and add or refresh it in the local search index.

selection.summary: Fetch and index a specific URL, optionally enqueueing discovered links.
selection.whenToUse: Use when you already know the target URL or when search results are stale or missing and a live fetch is needed.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for broad discovery when a ranked search query can narrow the candidate set first.
